name: Lending Capital Group, Inc. NMLS#1680087
description_short: Lending Capital Group is a mortgage lender specializing in fast home purchase and refinance loans, marketing 7-day closings through their FastAdvantage pre-approval program.
description_long:
Lending Capital Group, Inc. (NMLS#1680087) operates as a mortgage lender headquartered in Southampton, Pennsylvania. The company positions itself in the competitive residential mortgage market with an emphasis on speed and streamlined processing. According to their website, they have been operating with a stated focus on integrity, competitive rates, and rapid loan closings. The company maintains an active web presence at lcgloans.com and accepts applications online, by phone, or in-person.

Lending Capital Group offers both home purchase mortgages and refinance loans. Their primary marketing angle centers on their "FastAdvantage™ pre-approval program," which they claim enables 7-day closings—significantly faster than typical 30-45 day mortgage timelines. The company provides pre-approval letters to qualified borrowers and coordinates with the borrower through underwriting, clearing to close, and final closing. They advertise the ability to provide loan quotes and discuss loan options with prospective borrowers, with application processing available through multiple channels.

The company differentiates itself primarily through speed and convenience. Their website emphasizes the competitive advantage of rapid pre-approval in fast-moving real estate markets, includes customer testimonials highlighting quick turnaround times, and advertises lower-than-disclosed closing costs in at least one testimonial. The multi-channel application process (online, phone, in-person) and their "Home of 7 Day Closings" trademark positioning suggest operational efficiency is central to their brand.

As a mortgage lender, Lending Capital Group operates within a heavily regulated industry with specific NMLS licensing requirements. While their website presents positive customer testimonials and emphasizes fast service, potential borrowers should note that mortgage approval depends on creditworthiness, income verification, property appraisal, and underwriting standards. The "7-day closing" claim, while distinctive, may apply only to pre-qualified borrowers with straightforward loan profiles. No specific information about loan programs (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo), interest rates, fees, or credit requirements appears on the homepage, requiring direct contact for detailed terms.
pros: Multi-channel application process: online, phone, or in-person applications available
FastAdvantage™ pre-approval program advertises significantly faster closings (7 days vs. standard 30-45 days)
Customer testimonials report final closing costs lower than originally disclosed amounts
Pre-approval letters provided showing maximum approved borrowing amount for competitive offer-making
Loan officers reportedly provide step-by-step communication throughout the mortgage process
Services both home purchase and refinance loan types
Accessibility support available with dedicated compliance contact for website accessibility issues
cons: No specific loan program details (FHA, VA, conventional, jumbo) disclosed on website
No interest rates, APRs, or fee schedules published for comparison shopping
7-day closing claim likely applies only to pre-qualified borrowers; timeline requirements for typical applicants unclear
Limited transparency on credit score requirements, debt-to-income minimums, or down payment options
Customer testimonials appear curated; no independent review platform links (BBB, Zillow, LenderFirm) provided for verification
best_for: Home buyers in competitive markets seeking rapid pre-approval to strengthen purchase offers
Homeowners with strong credit profiles and straightforward financial situations qualifying for expedited processing
Refinance applicants looking for faster loan turnaround than traditional lenders offer
diagnosis: Lending Capital Group is best suited for qualified homebuyers or refinancers in competitive markets who prioritize speed and convenience over extensive loan program options or rate shopping. The main caveat is that the advertised 7-day closing likely requires strong credit, substantial down payments, and straightforward financial profiles—average applicants should confirm realistic timelines before assuming expedited processing applies to their situation.
services: Pre-approval letters showing loan eligibility amount
Loan processing and clearing to close
Rate quotes and loan option consultation
Web-based customer account access (MY ACCOUNT portal)
meta_description: Lending Capital Group specializes in fast home purchase and refinance loans with 7-day closings through their FastAdvantage pre-approval program.
